body_txt: Squick : Possibly a contraction of "squeamish" and "Ick!" A negative emotional response, more specifically a disturbed or disgusted one. "Squicky" and "squicked" are also common forms, with this very wiki having apparently invented the form "squicktastic". Not to be confused with Squee , the very opposite. We hope. Things that make the audience throw up often make the characters throw up as well. We have a whole pile of Disgust Tropes for in-universe squick.
